# KIM3310 Systems Gallery

Purpose: product storefront for architecture packs, demos, and implementation-ready systems
Free entry point: free systems gallery with live demos and architecture links
Paid boundary: paid architecture pack bundle, implementation sprint, or private adaptation of a repo
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/doeon-kim-portfolio/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/doeon-kim-portfolio
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/doeon-kim-portfolio/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/doeon-kim-portfolio/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: mailto:ehdjs1351@gmail.com?subject=KIM3310%20Systems%20Gallery%20private%20workspace&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20paid%20architecture%20pack%20bundle%2C%20implementation%20sprint%2C%20or%20private%20adaptation%20of%20a%20repo%20for%20KIM3310%20Systems%20Gallery.

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for KIM3310 Systems Gallery demo, KIM3310 Systems Gallery system architecture, KIM3310 Systems Gallery developer tool, product storefront for architecture packs, demos, and implementation-ready systems service.
